recordings.title: Gutter Onboarding Call
recordings.description: Reference for how a real gutter client onboarding call is run. Note: gutters require different ad angles and ~2x the booking volume vs roofing to be profitable.

recordings.title: Roofing Onboarding Call
recordings.description: Reference for how a real roofing client onboarding call is run. Primary niche (80–90% of clients). Watch this one carefully.

recordings.title: HVAC Onboarding Call
recordings.description: Reference for HVAC-specific onboarding nuances. Different pain points and seasonality vs roofing.

recordings.title: Service Delivery Part 1
recordings.description: GHL setup walkthrough — how the sub-account build works from start to finish.

recordings.title: Service Delivery Part 2
recordings.description: Most recent service delivery process. Watch this first before Part 1 if choosing one.

recordings.title: Entire GHL Build Start to Finish
recordings.description: Complete sub-account build walkthrough using standard A2P (not A2P Wizard). Understand the full picture even though Emmanuel handles this for you.

reference_recordings.title: New Onboarding Process & Comp Structure
reference_recordings.description: Jonathan, Cole, and Tyler walk through the updated onboarding process and compensation structure. Key context for how pod managers are expected to operate.

reference_recordings.title: Accounts Review
reference_recordings.description: Oscar and Jonathan review account health across all pods — covers what good and bad account management looks like, and how to handle underperforming campaigns.

reference_recordings.title: Pod 3 Marketing Meeting
reference_recordings.description: Jonathan runs through marketing strategy with Pod 3 — covers account triage, creative refreshes, and how to read Meta performance data.

reference_recordings.title: Day 1 Onboarding — Pod 4
reference_recordings.description: Full Day 1 onboarding session with Sam. The most comprehensive single recording of what new pod managers cover — tools, process, client management, and expectations.

sop_links.title: Service Delivery SOP
sop_links.description: Full written SOP for the service delivery process. Reference document — don't memorize, know where to find it.

tools.title: Ad Set Reviewer
tools.description: QA tool used by VAs and media buyers to review creatives before launch. Know these standards — you're approving setups.
